specific_question: When was the major redesign of the vehicle ordering process at Elexion Automotive implemented?
answer: The Sales Operations director oversaw a multidisciplinary group that redesigned the car ordering procedure in August 2024 to simplify the paperwork for customers.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
